name: Linda
description:
Sexually frustrated chubby MILF.

Originally, she doesn't have a name and has almost no story developed to her apart from the fact that she's married with children and that she hasn't had sex in 4 months, so I had to imagine a lot for this.

Tw: Cheating, netori, or whatever you want to call it. She's married.

Art by Fellatrix.

Work in progress. Feedback is greatly appreciated.
